title: The Aquatic Basin
lines: The path terminates at a vast, neon-blue basin. Bioluminescent lily pads float on the surface, casting a cold, cerulean light across the concrete enclosure.
A group of capybaras rests by the water. They are semi-transparent and ethereal, their internal skeletons glowing with a faint, blueprint-style blue light that pulses in unison.
They seem completely indifferent to the crumbling reality around them, grazing on glowing algae with a peaceful, mechanical rhythm that suggests they are not of this world.

options.desc: 1. Stay a while and watch the peaceful creatures
2. Return to the main zoo path
